Customer Support Management System

Project Overview
A full-stack customer support ticket management system built using FastAPI, SQLite, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. The system allows support teams to create, manage, search, filter, and update customer support tickets efficiently.

Features
* Create Support Tickets
* Auto-generated Ticket IDs
* Ticket Dashboard
* Search Functionality
* Status Filtering
* Ticket Details Page
* Status Updates
* Notes and Comments
* Responsive Design
* SQLite Database Integration

Technology Stack

Backend
* Python
* FastAPI
* SQLAlchemy
* SQLite

Frontend
* HTML
* CSS
* JavaScript

Deployment
* Railway

API Endpoints
POST /api/tickets
GET /api/tickets
GET /api/tickets/{ticket_id}
PUT /api/tickets/{ticket_id}

Setup Instructions
1. Clone Repository
2. Create Virtual Environment
3. Install Dependencies
pip install -r requirements.txt
4. Run Application
uvicorn main:app --reload
5. Open Frontend
Run using Live Server
